name: skill-architect-multy-plan
description: Creates a structured multi-skill suite plan. Accepts an optional reference file or gathers input conversationally. Outputs a [suite-name]-plan.md consumed by skill-architect-multy-exec.

reference_file.description: Optional path to a reference file (Markdown, text, or JSON) describing the skill suite.

output_path.description: Directory where the plan file will be saved. Defaults to current working directory.

suite_name.description: Override the inferred suite name. Must be lowercase, hyphens only, max 64 chars.

prefill.description: Pre-fill context passed from skill-architect when delegating (name_candidate, idea, step1_notes).
